channel.title: GitHub Fortran Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Fortran in GitHub

item.title: xianyi/OpenBLAS
item.description: OpenBLAS is an optimized BLAS library based on GotoBLAS2 1.13 BSD version.

item.title: E3SM-Project/E3SM
item.description: Energy Exascale Earth System Model source code.

item.title: GEOS-ESM/UMD_Etc
item.description: Repository containing the UMD_Etc code

item.title: GEOS-ESM/GEOSchem_GridComp
item.description: GEOS Earth System Model Chemistry Components

item.title: GEOS-ESM/FVdycoreCubed_GridComp
item.description: MAPL/ESMF wrapper for the cubed-sphere finite volume dynamical core

item.title: gonum/mathext
item.description: mathext implements basic elementary functions not included in the Go standard library [DEPRECATED]

item.title: MPAS-Dev/MPAS-Model
item.description: Repository for MPAS models and shared framework releases.

item.title: GEOS-ESM/MAPL
item.description: MAPL is a foundation layer of the GEOS architecture, whose original purpose is to supplement the Earth System Modeling Framework (ESMF)

item.title: GEOS-ESM/GOCART
item.description: GOCART Aerosol model including process library and framework interfaces (MAPL, NUOPC, and CCPP)

item.title: CVMix/CVMix-src
item.description: CVMix source code (including protex documentation) as well as build system and examples / tests

item.title: OpenFAST/openfast
item.description: Main repository for the NREL-supported OpenFAST whole-turbine and FAST.Farm wind farm simulation codes.

item.title: TEOS-10/GSW-Fortran
item.description: Gibbs-SeaWater (GSW) Oceanographic Toolbox in Fortran

item.title: GEOS-ESM/GMAO_Shared
item.description: Repository for GEOS Earth System Model shared infrastructure

item.title: cp2k/cp2k
item.description: Quantum chemistry and solid state physics software package

item.title: earth-system-radiation/rte-rrtmgp
item.description: RTE+RRTMGP is a set of codes for computing radiative fluxes in planetary atmospheres.

item.title: E3SM-Project/Ocean-BGC
item.description: This repository will house the columnized ocean BGC modules

item.title: wrf-model/WRF
item.description: The official repository for the Weather Research and Forecasting (WRF) model

item.title: grimme-lab/xtb
item.description: Semiempirical Extended Tight-Binding Program Package

item.title: MPP-LSM/MPP
item.description: Multi-Physics Problem (MPP) library is a standalone library that solves biophysics problems relevant to global land surface models (LSMs).

item.title: BeTR-biogeochemistry-modeling/sbetr
item.description: Standalone implementation of BeTR, the Biogeochemical Transport and Reaction module

item.title: CFMIP/COSPv2.0
item.description: COSP - The CFMIP (Cloud Feedbacks Model Intercomparison Project) Observation Simulator Package

item.title: CICE-Consortium/Icepack
item.description: Development repository for sea-ice column physics

item.title: NGEET/fates
item.description: repository for the Functionally Assembled Terrestrial Ecosystem Simulator (FATES)
